text_block_list.name: Dark-haired Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Are you okay on time? You're running the NHK
Mile Cup today, right?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Yeah, it's fine! Sorry for calling you out so early.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: There was something I just had to ask you!

text_block_list.name: Dark-haired Umamusume
text_block_list.text: What is it?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Could you come watch me at the NHK Mile Cup?

text_block_list.name: Dark-haired Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
...I saw your interview. You were serious when you
said you'd put on a great show, weren't you?

text_block_list.name: Dark-haired Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
But no matter how great a runner you are, you
can't make all your problems disappear with the
snap of a finger.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I know. I was actually wondering if I should take
on the Derby up until the very last minute.

text_block_list.name: Dark-haired Umamusume
text_block_list.text: What?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
When I was a child, I failed to match up to the
actor I looked up to, so I decided to pursue
racing.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
And in the world of racing, the Derby is a grand
stage that one can only stand upon once in their
life.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I thought if I stood on that stage and won, I could
hold my head high in front of that actor.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Or, even if I didn't win, I could at least be a
worthy competitor and put on a good show for
everyone.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: The thought was very tempting.

text_block_list.name: Dark-haired Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Then why did you change your mind?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Because if I run in races I'm best suited for
instead, I can put on the most brilliant
performances I'm capable of!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: I was just too enthralled by that potential.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
My trainer gave me the push I needed to make
the choice, and that's why I'm taking on the mile
tour.
Fuji Kiseki smiles gently at the troubled student.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
The race's prestige isn't what gets the audience
excited.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
It's the runners' radiance and the captivatingly
dramatic competition that excites them.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
So long as we shine, any race we run can be the
best one ever. It doesn't matter if it's a mile race
or one of the Classics.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Racers who run mile races aren't "lesser" than
those who run in the Classics!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to wager every single hope and dream I
had for the Derby on today's race.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: So please, won't you come watch me?

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
I came to cheer Fuji Kiseki on, but I'd be lying if I
said I wasn't disappointed she's not taking on the
Triple Crown tour anymore.

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
Yeah... I really wanted to see her run in the
Derby.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Fan Club Member A
text_block_list.text:
Urgh! So many people are losing faith in Fuji! Oh,
I hope things will be okay!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Fan Club Member A
text_block_list.text: Stay strong! If we don't believe in her, who will?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Fan Club Member A
text_block_list.text:
Look, I even completely redid my banner for
today! Just focus on cheering her on with all your
heart!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Fan Club Member A
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh! You're right! I guess that's why you're the
leader!

text_block_list.name: Dark-haired Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
There's no way I could've refused to come after the talk
we had...

Mixed feelings of expectation and anxiety fill the
air as the curtain rises on the NHK Mile Cup!
